headline: Irene Esteves Joins Johnson Controls Board As Capital Decisions Scrutinized
summary: Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) has appointed Irene Esteves to its board of directors. Esteves brings experience in global finance, industrial technology, and board governance across large organizations. The appointment reflects Johnson Controls International's focus on board refreshment aligned with its business priorities in building technologies and energy efficiency. For investors tracking NYSE:JCI, the board change comes with the stock trading around $139.36. The company has...
